Container.Name: houndarr
Container.Overview: Houndarr is a self-hosted companion for Radarr, Sonarr, Lidarr, Readarr, and Whisparr that schedules missing, cutoff-unmet, and optional upgrade searches in small, rate-limited batches. It triggers searches through your *arr apps but does not download media, manage indexers, or modify files.
Container.Changes: Initial Community Applications release for Houndarr. Current upstream release: 1.6.1.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Houndarr web interface.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database and master key. Back this up.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file ownership inside the container.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file ownership inside the container.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set to true when running behind a reverse proxy with HTTPS termination.

Config.Name: Trusted Proxies
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of trusted reverse-proxy IPs or CIDR subnets for X-Forwarded-For (e.g. 172.18.0.0/16). Required for accurate rate limiting behind a proxy.

Config.Name: Auth Mode
Config.Description: Authentication mode: builtin (default) or proxy (delegate auth to reverse proxy/SSO).

Config.Name: Auth Proxy Header
Config.Description: Username header from reverse proxy in proxy mode (for example Remote-User). Required when Auth Mode is proxy.
